name: USS Bebas (DE 10)
events: 4 Aug 1944 During 4/5 August 1944, USS Hawkbill (T/Cdr. F.W. Scanland, Jr., USN) and USS Scabbardfish (T/Cdr. F.A. Gunn, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with USS Carlson (Lt.Cdr. J.A. Stapleton, USNR) and USS Bebas (Lt.Cdr. J.R. Schweizer, USNR). These included night exercises.

6 Aug 1944 USS Barbero (T/Cdr. I.S. Hartman, USN) and USS Hawkbill (T/Cdr. F.W. Scanland, Jr., USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with USS Carlson (Lt.Cdr. J.A. Stapleton, USNR) and USS Bebas (Lt.Cdr. J.R. Schweizer, USNR).
